zh.Edlingham, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Felton於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆時，她的父親Sir William de Felton37歲，母親Isabel Heron33歲。她於1357年8月之前與Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年之前。

zh-hans.Edlingham, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Felton于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆时，她的父亲Sir William de Felton37岁，母亲Isabel Heron33岁。她于1357年8月之前与Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Felton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called. Most of them, including those in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset (Winford), are named from Old English feld ‘pasture, open country’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Another place of the same name in Somerset, also known as Whitchurch, has as its first element Old English filethe ‘hay’. Felton Hill in Northumberland is named with the Old English personal name Fygla (a derivative of fugol ‘bird’; compare Fowle ).

variants.name: Fowle
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Felton was born about 1335, in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Felton, was 37 and her mother, Isabel Heron, was 33. She married Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight before August 1357, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died before 1367.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Felton est née environ 1335, à Edlingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Felton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabel Heron, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight avant août 1357, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1367.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Felton um 1335 in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Felton 37 und ihre Mutter Isabel Heron 33. Sie hat vor August 1357 in England, United Kingdom Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1367.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Felton è nata il circa 1335 nel Edlingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Felton, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Isabel Heron, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight prima del agosto 1357, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1367.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Feltonが約1335年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドエドリンガムで生まれた時，父Sir William de Feltonは37歳，母Isabel Heronは33歳であった。1357年8月以前にイギリスイギリスでLord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Felton(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 에들링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Felton(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Heron(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1357년 8월 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Felton nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Felton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Heron, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight antes agosto de 1357, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1367.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Felton родилась около 1335 г. в местности эдлингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Felton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Heron, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight перед августа 1357 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1367 г.

Se casó con Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight antes de agosto de 1357, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1367.
